description: Sets width and height for containers (g2d, mathtext, g3d) using logical coordinate units
utility: Dynamically resize containers to specific dimensions

arguments.name: containers
arguments.description: One or more variable references to containers (g2d, mathtext, or g3d)

alternates.description: Set container to 8 columns wide, 10 rows tall
Set multiple containers to same dimensions (6 columns, 8 rows)
